examples: Most of the time, she is bossy and pushy.
Tears conquer the face of the bossy head nurse.
If you weren't so bossy, I wouldn't have done that!
More thoughtful Labourites worry that dismissing localism leaves them stranded as the party of the bossy, big state.
In the 1920s and 30s, the headings of pages carried bossy instructions to customers about the correct phone etiquette.
